title: Four Elemental Swords
description: This mod adds four elemental swords and a special sword with different power and effects
body:
This mod adds four elemental swords with different power, velocity and effects: fire sword, water sword, air sword and earth sword.   
And a special sword: Sword of the Gods.

The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)  
The mod is compatible with: [BetterCombat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

These swords allow you to activate, with the right click, different powerful effects. You can use "Hold Shift" with the sword for more information about the powers it gives.

You can repair your sword using other sword of the same type or on anvil using the material used to craft the sword.

You can enchant the sword.

***Update***  
- From [ElementalSwords-1.20.2-2.7.5-[FORGE]
](https://modrinth.com/mod/four-elemental-swords/version/2.7.5
) and from [ElementalSwords-1.20.2-1.7.8-[FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/mod/four-elemental-swords/version/1.7.8) there is a Config file (elemental-sword-parameters.toml) to handle and modify swords parameters (Damage, Attack Speed and Durability). Also, added at this config file: "elemental-swords-effects.toml" the options to modify the duration of effects.

***Config File:***  
For now there are two config files:

**elemental-swords-config.toml**:  For deactivate or activate the swords (all active by default) and for choose if use Diamond or Netherite Sword for the recipes.

**elemental-swords-effects.toml**:  For deactivate or activate the various weapons effects and change the level of this effects.

[Here](https://github.com/BlackWolf00/Elemental-Swords-Public) if you want to help me translate into different languages: https://github.com/BlackWolf00/Elemental-Swords-Public

Thanks to lauchering for the mod review: https://youtu.be/NKJpz7jzL0c  
Thanks to MisterEcho for the mod review: https://youtu.be/NqmCVMUENRs  
Thanks to EscanorBlock for the mod review: https://youtu.be/txIWaAgYM38?t=522  

***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***

**FIRE SWORD** (Gives fire resistance to the Player and put on fire the enemies)  
ATTACK: 10 SPEED: 2.6  
![Recipe of Fire Sword](https://i.imgur.com/M27MWMu.png)

**AIR SWORD** (Gives Jump Boost max lv., Speed max lv. and Slow Falling to the Player)  
ATTACK: 8 SPEED: 3.9  
![Recipe of Air Sword](https://i.imgur.com/TwBofHs.png)

**WATER SWORD** (Gives Conduit Power max lv., Dolphins Grace max lv. and Water Breathing max lv. to the Player)  
ATTACK: 9 SPEED: 3.1  
![Recipe of Water Sword](https://i.imgur.com/irQaGrB.png)

**EARTH SWORD** (Gives Absorption lv. 3, Resistance lv. 3 and Strength lv. 3 to the Player)  
ATTACK: 14 SPEED: 1.6  
![Recipe of Earth Sword](https://i.imgur.com/B9UnDPy.png)

**SWORD OF THE GODS** (Gives different and powerful effects to the Player)  
ATTACK: 24 SPEED: 3.4  
![Recipe of Sword of the Gods](https://i.imgur.com/eoJM9lB.png)
